description_long: This is a plush, cartoonish monster toy with a bright green, textured body resembling fur. It has a single large cyclopean eye centered on its face, above a small, smiling mouth with three dark blue or black bumps below it. The toy features two prominent, spiraled horns on its head, colored with alternating orange and dark blue stripes. Its feet are large and flat, with orange-tipped toes, and its arms are short and rounded, extending slightly from its sides. The back of the toy is plain except for a subtle slot, possibly for coins, and the overall form is squat and rounded, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance.
description: A bright green, plush monster toy with a single large eye, striped orange and blue horns, and orange-tipped toes. Its body is textured and rounded, with a friendly, cartoonish face.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cyclopean eye, smiling mouth, three dark bumps, and both striped horns clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the horns and the rounded arm, with the face partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the textured back and a narrow slot near the top, with both horns visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right rear angle shows the right arm, the back slot, and the curvature of the horns, with less of the face visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The toy has a friendly, smiling expression with a single large eye and a small, upturned mouth. There are no visible eyebrows, and the features give it a cheerful and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly out to the sides and feet flat on the ground.
